sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ المُسْلِمُونَ فِي أَنْحَاءِ العَالَمِ العَرَبِيِّ بِعِيدِ الفِطْرِ بَعْدَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani širom arapskog svijeta proslavljaju Ramazanski bajram nakon mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims across the Arab world celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَيْقِظُ النَّاسُ بَاكِرًا لِأَدَاءِ صَلَاةِ العِيدِ فِي المَسَاجِدِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se bude rano kako bi obavili bajram-namaz u džamijama.
sentences.translationEn: People wake up early to perform the Eid prayer in mosques.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَشْعُرُونَ بِسَعَادَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače novu odjeću i osjećaju veliku sreću.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and feel great happiness.

sentences.arabic: تَبَادَلُ العَائِلَاتُ الزِّيَارَاتِ وَيُقَدِّمُونَ الحَلْوِيَّاتِ لِلضُّيُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice razmjenjuju posjete i nude slatkiše gostima.
sentences.translationEn: Families exchange visits and offer sweets to guests.

sentences.arabic: يَعُمُّ الفَرَحُ وَالتَّسَامُحُ بَيْنَ الجَمِيعِ فِي هَذِهِ المُنَاسَبَةِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Radost i tolerancija vladaju među svima u ovoj sretnoj prilici.
sentences.translationEn: Joy and tolerance prevail among everyone on this happy occasion.
